business.type_label: fractional CFO / financial strategy advisory firm

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a firm/person (Steve Coughran, Coltivar) with defined financial expertise — the page sells credentialed advisory service, leaning on testimonials, results stats, and a proven process/system. Sells defined expertise → trust, first rung of the ladder.

goal.one_action: apply for a free financial health check (or book a 20-minute strategy call) — a lead/booking conversion for the advisory engagement

structure.archetype_note: Nav shows 10 top-level items (Workshops, Financial Literacy, Why Coltivar?, Customers, Tools, Articles, Videos, Books, Client Portal, Get Started); only 5 captured. Kajabi-built content-marketing hub wrapping a lead-gen advisory site.

mapped.observed_as: We show you where your money is. And how to make more of it.
Free to start. Clear from day one.
Strategy Meets Finance (podcast stats + platform logos)
Video Testimonials / More From Those Who Have Worked With Us

unmapped.observed: Business Calculators — 13 interactive financial calculator tools
unmapped.why_no_fit: Interactive utility tools are a content/product surface, not a persuasion section; no canonical id covers self-serve calculators

unmapped.observed: More Resources — downloadable lead-magnet guides (Growth Roadmap, Cash Flow Blueprint)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Gated downloadable asset cards don't map cleanly to any section id

unmapped.observed: Podcast promotion (Strategy Meets Finance, 200+ episodes, 1.3M downloads, listen platforms)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Owned-media promo block; partially proof, partially a distinct content channel

proposed_new.name: interactive-calculators
proposed_new.evidence: Tools page lists 13 business calculators 'built to help you understand your numbers' — interactive utilities, not expressible in the closed capability vocab

proposed_new.name: podcast/media-hub
proposed_new.evidence: Dedicated podcast (podcast.coltivar.com) with episode/download stats and Spotify/Apple embeds; footer resource menu spans Articles, Videos, Books, Benchmarks — a media hub beyond a landing page

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial: /about (the trust-establishing 'Why Coltivar?' page) returned only base64 image data with no extractable text, and only 5 of 10 nav pages captured. Home/customers/tools/workshops captured well, so engine + goal are clear, but section depth on the founder-story page is unverified.

gap_findings: Interactive business calculators (13 tools) have no capability in the closed vocab — proposed 'interactive-calculators'.
Podcast + full media/content hub (Articles, Videos, Books, Benchmarks) exceeds landing-page scope — proposed 'podcast/media-hub'.

Site runs multiple parallel conversion paths (health-check lead form, book-a-call scheduling, newsletter/book download, gated guide downloads) — the single one_action model underrepresents a multi-funnel advisory hub.
